caption: The video features a presentation titled "Today: Industry-Ready ML" at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, held from July 23 to 29, 2018. The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, is delivering a talk on various aspects of machine learning (ML) and data pipelines. The slide displayed outlines key topics such as an overview and caveats in scaling data pipelines, components of Airflow including Celery and ML models, the difference between ML and data pipelines, and an overview of Airflow with a use case. The background of the slide is a network-like design, emphasizing the interconnected nature of data and technology. The presenter appears engaged, gesturing to emphasize points as he explains the "big picture" of industry-ready machine learning.
